title: E-NCAP Safe Driving 细分项与分值分配
content: Safe Driving总分100，包含三部分：Occupant Monitoring 30分（Seatbelt usage 10、Occupant classification 10、Occupant presence 10）；Driver Engagement 30分（Driver Monitoring 25、Driving Controls 5）；Vehicle Assistance 40分（Speed Assistance 20、ACC Performance 15、Steering Assistance 5）。其中Occupant Monitoring与Driver Monitoring直接关联舱内感知能力。
